spec.description: ROCm AMD Infinity Context System: KV cache storage, LMCache, vLLM inference, GPU metrics, and AIS I/O. AIC storage may be local block device, hipfile, NFS, or other backends. Use GPU Activity by ID to pick the busiest gpu_id on multi-GPU nodes.

spec.title: GPU and (Optionally) Server Power
spec.description: Total power delivered to the GPU running vLLM. Where possible we include the server power if available.

spec.title: GPU Activity
spec.description: The activity factor of the CUs and UMC in the GPU. This is given as a percentage of total compute power avaliable.

spec.title: VRAM Utilization
spec.description: The amount of VRAM currently in use.

spec.title: KV Cache Storage Bandwidth
spec.description: The read and write bandwidth into and out of the AIC KV Cache Storage.

spec.title: LMCache Store and Retrieve Requests
spec.description: The total number of LMCache Store and Retrieve requests.

spec.title: Token Rate by Source
spec.description: The tokens per second from compute, local CPU cache and AIC cache.

spec.title: AIC KV Cache Block File Count
spec.description: The total count of KV Cache Blocks on the AIC storage device.

spec.title: AIC Free Capacity
spec.description: The capacity remaining on the ROCm AIC storage system.

spec.title: KV Cache Block Hit Histogram
spec.description: A time-based histogram of the AIS KV Cache Blocks and the number of times they have been "hit" as in retrieved by the KV Block Manager.

spec.title: Requests Completed per Second
spec.description: Requests per second for the vLLM run. A measure of total throughput based on average number of requests findishnig per second.

spec.title: vLLM - AIC Hit Ratio
spec.description: External prefix cache (LMCache / KV connector) hit ratio from vllm:external_prefix_cache_* counters.

spec.title: AIS Stats - Throughput
spec.description: The throughput reported by the AIS stats tool.

spec.title: AIS Stats Latency
spec.description: The latency of IO as reported by ais-stats.

spec.title: KV Cache Utilization
spec.description: Share of KV-cache blocks in use on the selected instance (vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc).

spec.title: AIC Storage Usage Rate
spec.description: Rate of change in AIC data filesystem used bytes by mount path on the selected instance.

spec.title: Time to First Token
spec.description: Time-to-first-token latency from vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket; p50 and p99 quantiles over $__rate_interval.

spec.title: GPU Activity by ID
spec.description: Mean GFX + UMC activity per GPU over the dashboard time range. Use the busiest gpu_id in the GPU ID variable when multiple GPUs are active.

spec.title: GPUs on Node
spec.description: Number of GPUs reporting activity on the selected instance.

spec.title: TTFT p99
spec.description: Latest p99 time-to-first-token for the selected vLLM instance.

spec.title: AIC Prefix Hit Ratio
spec.description: External prefix cache hit ratio (LMCache / KV connector).

spec.title: AIC Storage Free %
spec.description: Free space percentage on the AIC data filesystem.

spec.title: KV Chunk Bytes
spec.description: Total on-disk LMCache .data chunk bytes (rocm_aic_kv_chunk_bytes_total).

spec.title: ROCm Version
spec.description: ROCm version reported by rocm-aic-exporter on the selected instance.

spec.title: ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context Dashboard

spec.name: instance
spec.label: Instance
spec.description: The node from which metrics have been obtained.

spec.name: gpu_id
spec.label: GPU ID
spec.description: The ID number of the target GPU in the target instance
